title: Anti-Gravity & Free Energy
summary: Suppressed propulsion and energy technologies the archive says already exist.
markdown:
**Anti-gravity** and **free energy** recur through the archive as technologies that, in
Unimetrix 1's telling, already exist but have been suppressed. It bundles them with
[teleportation](/lore/teleportation/) and food [replication](/lore/replicator/) among the
capabilities that disclosure and [first contact](/lore/first-contact/) would release to
"your denizen."

The archive ties these technologies to the hidden infrastructure of the
[Secret Space Program](/lore/secret-space-program/) — including the antigravity craft it calls
"TR-3 Astra," which it links to the [Beirut explosion](/lore/lebanon-attack/) — and contrasts
them with the [alien power sources](/lore/alien-power-sources/) and fusion systems discussed in
the later "alien circuitry" sessions.

For Unimetrix 1, free energy is both a technology and a theme: the withheld abundance whose
release marks the shift from a world of scarcity and control to the one it forecasts.
